title: boechera atrorubens
intro: Boechera atrorubens, also known as the dark reddish purple rockcress, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae, native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Boechera atrorubens include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to support the immune system and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Boechera atrorubens can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to apply the plant's medicinal properties to the skin.
